SQLLite.SQL: SELECT CEI.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CasePartyNumber" , CEI.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "PartyRoleCode" , CEI.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CEI.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "SubjectPartyKey" FROM CASE_EVENT_INSTIGATORS CEI , CASE_EVENTS CE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND CEI.EVENT_SEQ = CE.EVENT_SEQ AND CEI.DELETE_FLAG IS NOT NULL AND CEI.DELETE_FLAG != 'Y' AND CE.DELETED_FLAG IS NOT NULL AND CE.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y' AND CE.EVENT_SEQ = (SELECT MAX(EVENT_SEQ) FROM CASE_EVENT_INSTIGATORS WHERE CASE_NUMBER = CEI.CASE_NUMBER AND DELETE_FLAG IS NOT NULL AND DELETE_FLAG != 'Y' AND CASE_PARTY_NO = CEI.CASE_PARTY_NO AND PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CEI.PARTY_ROLE_CODE)
